nasb.text: Now therefore, kill every male among the little ones, and kill every woman who has known man intimately.

esv.text: Now therefore, kill every male among the little ones, and kill every woman who has known man by lying with him.

cnv.text: 現在你們要把所有的男孩都殺了，也要殺死所有與男人發生過關係的婦人。

ccb.text: 现在，你们要杀掉所有的男孩以及与男人发生过关系的女子，
